creator: geraud@gcu.info
text:
On 04/08/2012 09:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-Perl-PrereqScanner,
>
> Please note that PR ports/166734 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166734
>

IF the submitter bumps the dependency of p5-CPAN-Meta appropriately in 
the Makefile, I'm fine with it.

Thanks,

Geraud.

-- 
G.
